name: oijudge
description: Local OI sample judge for VS Code with custom checkers, File IO, and runtime diagnostics.

oijudger.setterMode.enabled.markdownDescription: When enabled, OI Judge shows problem setter tools such as selecting the standard solution, maintaining sample names, and managing data configuration.
